qids.subject: Algorithms
qids.prose: The minimum number of comparisons required to determine if an integer appears more than times in a sorted array of integers is A. B. C. D.

qids.subject: Algorithms
qids.prose: We have a binary heap on elements and wish to insert more elements (not necessarily one after another) into this heap. The total time required for this is A. B. C. D.
